title: Clone a habit and check in
goal: Join a community habit, save a simple protocol, and submit a private daily check-in.

tooltip.title: Join a habit
tooltip.body: Start from a real community check-in. This copies its habit into your space.

tooltip.title: Keep the defaults
tooltip.body: The starter protocol is already selected. Save it to reach today’s check-in.

tooltip.title: Write an honest note
tooltip.body: Add a short check-in here—the demo-safe alternative to recording audio or video.

tooltip.title: Get coaching
tooltip.body: Submit the private check-in to receive a tailored next step.
